case_title: MARINE BENOIS VS. SONIA MARIA EL GHAOUI EDWARDS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MARINE BENOIS IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED FRENCH INTERPRETER CHARLES LEGIER. DEFENDANT SONIA MARIA EL GHAOUI EDWARDS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENOIS, MARINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDWARDS, SONIA MARIA EL GHAOUI $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY BENOIS, MARINE AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, SONIA MARIA EL GHAOUI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $60.00 SERVED MAR-29-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, SONIA MARIA EL GHAOUI
